angle_used: Cold owner: name on the line
subject: Painting that doesn't burn your name
body:
Hi Jeff,

Bonafide's run carries your name. When painting drags or hands over a punch list, the developer's call is to you, not the painting sub.

Ashrah Painting holds the schedule. Lumi (our AI estimating agent) returns a 95%-detailed bid in 24 hours, at least 13% lower than human-estimated subs. Lumia keeps your PM informed during the job. Pro cleaning at handoff with no surface damage.

Worth 15 minutes?
signals_used: Bonafide = Jeff Herlick = Owner (likely son of founder per earlier research).
